title: Simple Sum
description: You have hired someone to help you with inventory on the farm. Unfortunately, the new cowhand has very limited math skills, and they are having trouble summing two numbers. Write a program to determine if the cowhand is adding these numbers correctly.
input:
The first and only line of input contains a string of the form:

a + b = c

It is guaranteed that a, b, and c are single-digit integers. The input line will have exactly 9 characters, formatted exactly as shown, with a single space separating each number and arithmetic operator.
output: Print on a single line, YES if the sum is correct; otherwise, print NO.
source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2017, Novice
